qtype: calculating working hours, wages, and currency exchange
tex:
(a) Ada works from Monday to Friday.
\newline

Her working hours each day are 08$\,$00 to 12$\,$30 and 13$\,$30 to 17$\,$00.
\newline

Find the number of hours she works in 5 days.
\newline

(b) Ada is paid \$15.20 per hour.
\newline

Work out her pay for these 5 days.
\newline

(c) On Saturday she is paid $1\dfrac{1}{2}$ times her normal hourly rate.
\newline

Work out her hourly rate of pay for Saturday.
\newline

(d) Ada changes 370 euros into dollars.
\newline

The exchange rate is \$1 = 0.925 euros.
\newline

Work out the amount she receives.
\newline

content.content:
Ada works from Monday to Friday.
\newline

Her working hours each day are 08$\,$00 to 12$\,$30 and 13$\,$30 to 17$\,$00.
\newline

Find the number of hours she works in 5 days.
\newline

Ada is paid \$15.20 per hour.
\newline

Work out her pay for these 5 days.
\newline

On Saturday she is paid $1\dfrac{1}{2}$ times her normal hourly rate.
\newline

Work out her hourly rate of pay for Saturday.
\newline

Ada changes 370 euros into dollars.
\newline

The exchange rate is \$1 = 0.925 euros.
\newline

Work out the amount she receives.
\newline

_rawBody:
\begin{parts}

\item Ada works from Monday to Friday.

Her working hours each day are 08\,00 to 12\,30 and 13\,30 to 17\,00.

\vgap

Find the number of hours she works in 5 days.

\vgap

\AnswerLine[][hours]
\Marks{2}

\item Ada is paid \$15.20 per hour.

\vgap

Work out her pay for these 5 days.

\vgap

\AnswerLine[\$][]
\Marks{1}

\item On Saturday she is paid $1\dfrac{1}{2}$ times her normal hourly rate.

\vgap

Work out her hourly rate of pay for Saturday.

\vgap

\AnswerLine[\$][]
\Marks{1}

\item Ada changes 370 euros into dollars.

The exchange rate is \$1 = 0.925 euros.

\vgap

Work out the amount she receives.

\vgap

\AnswerLine[\$][]
\Marks{1}

\end{parts}

tex:
Ali invests \$2950 in an account paying 12\% **compound** interest.
\newline

Bob invests \$3000 in an account paying 12\% **simple** interest.
\newline

\newline

stem.content:
Ali invests \$2950 in an account paying 12\% \textbf{compound} interest.
\newline

Bob invests \$3000 in an account paying 12\% \textbf{simple} interest.
\newline

Show that after 3 years Ali has a larger investment than Bob.
\newline

_rawBody:
Ali invests \$2950 in an account paying 12\% \textbf{compound} interest.

Bob invests \$3000 in an account paying 12\% \textbf{simple} interest.

\vgap

Show that after 3 years Ali has a larger investment than Bob.

\vgap

\Answerspace[8cm]
